# typstR

`typstR` gives research and policy teams a working-paper-first path from
Quarto source to a polished Typst PDF. The package ships scaffold
helpers, publication metadata helpers, and bundled templates so you can
stay in a normal Quarto workflow while using a publication-ready format.

## Start here

Install the package in R:

``` r

remotes::install_github("DavidZenz/typstR")
```

> You can install `typstR` immediately in R. Quarto is only required
> when you render a document.

The default onboarding path is:

``` r

library(typstR)

create_working_paper("my-paper")
# edit my-paper/template.qmd
render_working_paper("my-paper/template.qmd")
```

That single working-paper flow is the canonical first run for the
package.

## What to edit after scaffolding

[`create_working_paper()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/create_working_paper.md)
creates four key pieces:

- `template.qmd` for the manuscript body and YAML front matter
- `_quarto.yml` for project-level Quarto settings
- `references.bib` for citations
- `_extensions/typstR/` for the bundled format extension

If you want the full walkthrough of how those files fit together, start
with [Getting
started](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/articles/getting-started.md).

## Where to go next

| If you need… | Start here |
|----|----|
| The full install -\> scaffold -\> render walkthrough | [Getting started](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/articles/getting-started.md) |
| More detail on title-page metadata and working-paper fields | [Working Papers](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/articles/working-papers.md) |
| Practical YAML knobs for logos, fonts, and color | [Customizing Branding](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/articles/customizing-branding.md) |
| Function-level help for scaffold and render wrappers | [Reference](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/index.md) |

## Other format entry points

Once the working-paper path is clear, you can branch into adjacent
formats:

``` r

create_article("my-article")
create_policy_brief("my-brief")
```

Use
[`create_article()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/create_article.md)
for article-style manuscripts and
[`create_policy_brief()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/create_policy_brief.md)
for shorter policy-facing outputs.

# Package index

## Scaffolding

- [`create_article()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/create_article.md)
  : Create an article project
- [`create_policy_brief()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/create_policy_brief.md)
  : Create a policy brief project
- [`create_working_paper()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/create_working_paper.md)
  : Create a working paper project

## Metadata helpers

- [`affiliation()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/affiliation.md)
  : Create an affiliation metadata object
- [`author()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/author.md) :
  Create an author metadata object
- [`manuscript_meta()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/manuscript_meta.md)
  : Create a manuscript metadata object
- [`funding()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/funding.md)
  : Specify a funding statement for a manuscript
- [`keywords()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/keywords.md)
  : Specify keywords for a manuscript
- [`jel_codes()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/jel_codes.md)
  : Specify JEL classification codes for a manuscript
- [`report_number()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/report_number.md)
  : Specify a report number for a manuscript
- [`appendix_title()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/appendix_title.md)
  : Emit a formatted appendix section title
- [`code_availability()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/code_availability.md)
  : Specify a code availability statement for a manuscript
- [`data_availability()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/data_availability.md)
  : Specify a data availability statement for a manuscript

## Publication helpers

- [`fig_note()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/fig_note.md)
  : Emit a figure note in markdown format
- [`tab_note()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/tab_note.md)
  : Emit a table note in markdown format

## Rendering

- [`render_pub()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/render_pub.md)
  : Render a Quarto document to PDF
- [`render_working_paper()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/render_working_paper.md)
  : Render a working paper to PDF

## Validation and diagnostics

- [`validate_render_environment()`](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/reference/validate_render_environment.md)
  : Validate render environment prerequisites

  Examples](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/articles/advanced-examples.md):

  Format](https://davidzenz.github.io/typstR/articles/format-comparison.md):
